name: How much money can I get for lost wages if my RSI keeps me out of work in Idaho?
description: You generally receive 66.6% of your average weekly wage in Idaho while you are unable to work. These benefits continue until you reach maximum medical improveme

mainEntity.name: How much money can I get for lost wages if my RSI keeps me out of work in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: You generally receive 66.6% of your average weekly wage in Idaho while you are unable to work. These benefits continue until you reach maximum medical improvement or your employer provides a job within your physical restrictions.
